div.head: ES–3. Editorial Note
div.p: By an exchange of notes, dated April 23 and November 17, 1958, respectively, El Salvador and the United States agreed, effective November 17, to extend for four years the existing agreement providing for a United States Army Mission to El Salvador. Copies of the notes were enclosed in despatch 317 from El Salvador, December 10. (716.58/12–1058) For text of the agreement, see 9 UST 1484.
